experience.label: Professional History
experience.title: Experience
experience.description: Building high-impact mobile and web products across fintech, cloud infrastructure, and enterprise — from electronic wallets to real-time platforms.
experience.role1Item1: Developing and maintaining a React Native mobile application for an electronic wallet with over 1 million active users.
experience.role1Item2: Collaborating within a Scrum team to deliver high-quality UX with a focus on performance and scalability.
experience.role1Item3: Working with React Native, TypeScript, Redux, and native iOS/Android modules.
experience.role2Item1: Built responsive web applications using React and TypeScript on the frontend.
experience.role2Item2: Developed RESTful APIs and backend services with Django REST Framework.
experience.role2Item3: Worked remotely delivering features across the full stack for cloud infrastructure products.
experience.role3Item1: Developed web applications with React and backend services with Django REST Framework.
experience.role3Item2: Built and maintained cross-platform mobile apps using React Native.
experience.role3Item3: Delivered end-to-end features from design to deployment across web and mobile platforms.
experience.role4Item1: Automated testing workflows and test cases during a college internship at the QA team.
experience.role4Item2: Built automated test suites using Java and Selenium WebDriver.
experience.role4Item3: Contributed to improving test coverage and reducing manual regression cycles.
experience.role5Item1: Delivering end-to-end solutions for clients across various industries.
experience.role5Item2: Building web apps with React and mobile apps with React Native, backed by Django REST Framework.
experience.role5Item3: Tech stack: React, React Native, TypeScript, Django REST Framework, PostgreSQL.

about.title: The Philosophy of Precise Restraint.
about.paragraph1: I believe that every pixel should serve a purpose. In an era of digital noise, luxury is defined by what we choose to leave out.
about.paragraph2: As a software developer, I treat code like structural engineering. It isn't just about functionality; it's about the elegance of the logic and the longevity of the architecture. My work bridges the gap between high-level design thinking and low-level technical execution.
